overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy exploring a tropical tribal village built on wooden walkways over misty water. The character walks through palm-lined wooden pathways, explores a scenic waterfront dock, and interacts with an NPC companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway through tropical tribal village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated wooden walkway, passing blue banners and palm trees

entered.detail: multi-story wooden structure with thatched roof and carved details
tall blue fabric banner hanging from wooden post
weathered wooden planks forming the walking surface
tall palm trees with green fronds swaying in background
wooden fence railing along walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks along an elevated wooden walkway through a tropical tribal village. Palm trees rise in the background while blue banners flutter on the left. The wooden planks and railings suggest a settlement built over water or marshland.

events.description: UI interaction prompt appears offering to speak with nearby NPC
moving from enclosed village walkway to open waterfront overlook with view of water

agents.ego_description: walking toward waterfront overlook, passing a Tenakth warrior standing by the railing

notable_agents.action: standing with red hair and tribal armor, facing away toward the water

entered.detail: open wooden platform extending toward the water's edge
calm water surface with morning mist hovering above
thick wooden support pillars with rope bindings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront plaza with a view of a misty lake. A Tenakth warrior stands to the left near the railing. The wooden walkway continues toward the water as the morning sun illuminates the distant cliffs across the lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending over calm water

events.description: stepping onto wooden dock extending over the misty water

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow wooden dock, looking out at misty water and distant mountain cliffs

entered.detail: thick wooden posts wrapped with heavy rope bindings
cargo netting stretched between wooden posts as safety barrier
wicker basket filled with fish sitting on dock planks
large rock formations and cliffs visible across the misty water

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over the calm, misty water. Rope netting serves as railings on the sides, and fishing baskets sit on the planks. The view opens to distant rocky cliffs shrouded in morning fog across the lake.

events.description: character turns around at end of dock to walk back toward village
dialogue interface appears, engaging in conversation with approaching NPC companion

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back toward village center, then engaging in dialogue with companion

notable_agents.action: approaching with red hair and spear, initiating conversation dialogue

entered.detail: large stone archway with carved details marking village entrance
wooden support beams and scaffolding against building
detailed wooden building front with carved patterns

segments.scene_description: Aloy turns around at the end of the dock and walks back toward the village. She passes under a stone archway entrance as a Tenakth warrior approaches from the right. The scene ends with a dialogue interface appearing as the NPC initiates conversation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tropical tribal village that transitions from narrow elevated walkways to an open, misty waterfront. It begins with Aloy walking along wooden planks lined with palm trees and fluttering blue banners, moving steadily forward as the path opens into a wide waterfront plaza. As the morning sun illuminates distant cliffs across a misty lake, the camera follows her further out onto a narrow wooden dock equipped with rope netting and fishing baskets. The scene then shifts as Aloy turns back toward the settlement, passing under a stone archway entrance while a Tenakth warrior approaches from the right. The movement finally concludes as the warrior initiates a conversation, bringing the exploration to a halt with the appearance of a dialogue interface.
